installCommand: (cd packages/audit-core && npm install --ignore-scripts) && (cd api && npm install --ignore-scripts)
buildCommand: cd client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://devies.se https://*.devies.se; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
